features: The package includes two clear double-sided nail brushes, made from high-quality plastic and bristles, ensuring a long-lasting and effective clean.
The nail brush is designed to be easily looped on the finger, making it easy to use for manicure. It is a nail art tool that must be used when repairing nails and opening a nail salon.
After trimming dead skin or polishing nails, there is a lot of dust and nail shavings on the nails and the skin around the nails
The handle brush is small and lightweight, does not take up much space, is easy to carry and store, and can also be carried in a travel bag or handbag if you are traveling or traveling.
In addition to being used for nail cleaning, double-sided brushes can also be used to clean shoes, clothes, around the sink, in the kitchen or for scrubbing smaller problem areas in the home.
description: Product Description 2 pcs nail brush hands Effectively removes dirt and debris around the nails and easily solves all the small cleaning problems of daily life. Nail Art Essentials - The nail brush design can be easily placed on the finger, making it convenient to use for manicure. - After cutting dead skin or polishing nails, use this product to gently remove dust and chips. - The brush with handle is small and lightweight, does not take up much space and is easy to carry and store. Quantity: 2 x Double-sided Nail Brush Material: high quality hard plastic Features: Double-sided design, lightweight and easy to carry, multifunctional use Clear Nail Brushes - Each brush is made of high quality plastic, strong and durable, and the transparent design makes the process more intuitive. Gentle care - The bristles are specially treated to be gentle on the skin and also suitable for sensitive skin. Compact and portable - Lightweight design, does not take up space, suitable for travel and daily use. Hard Bristles - High quality bristles are hard and durable and effectively remove dirt, debris and dead skin around the nail. Daily Manicure - This nail brush is an essential tool to facilitate nail care. Lightweight design - Whether you are traveling for business or pleasure, you can easily store it in your travel bag and keep it clean at all times. Vital Cleansing - This brush can also be used to clean shoes, kitchen corners and other small areas, making it very convenient to use a brush for multiple purposes. Transparent and aesthetically pleasing - Transparent colour, intuitive use and aesthetically pleasing.
